objectives: Explain core DevOps concepts and how code moves from commit to production
Identify where Git, Ci/Cd Pipelines, Containers (Docker), and Cloud Platforms (Aws/Azure/Gcp) fit in a delivery lifecycle
learning_path.title: DevOps Foundations and Workflow Overview

objectives: Create and manage repositories with effective branching and merging practices
Resolve common collaboration scenarios using commits, pull/merge workflows, and history inspection
learning_path.title: Git Essentials for Team Collaboration

objectives: Perform essential Linux Administration tasks used in build and runtime environments
Manage users, permissions, services, and basic troubleshooting for delivery pipelines
learning_path.title: Linux Administration for DevOps Environments

objectives: Write reliable Bash scripts to automate repetitive operational tasks
Use Bash to glue together Git actions, Linux commands, and deployment steps
learning_path.title: Scripting (Bash) for Automation

objectives: Design a basic Ci/Cd Pipelines flow from commit to deployment
Implement pipeline stages that use Git and Bash-driven automation
learning_path.title: Ci/Cd Pipelines: Build, Test, and Deploy Concepts

objectives: Build and run container images and understand container lifecycle basics
Apply containerization to standardize environments used by Ci/Cd Pipelines
learning_path.title: Containers (Docker): Packaging and Runtime Fundamentals

objectives: Explain key Kubernetes concepts and how workloads are scheduled and managed
Deploy and update containerized applications using Kubernetes primitives
learning_path.title: Container Orchestration (Kubernetes): Core Objects and Deployments

objectives: Map common cloud building blocks to application deployment needs
Operate containerized workloads in Cloud Platforms (Aws/Azure/Gcp) with an emphasis on reliability and repeatability
learning_path.title: Cloud Platforms (Aws/Azure/Gcp): Deploying and Operating Workloads

objectives: Create and manage infrastructure definitions using Terraform workflows
Integrate Terraform execution into Ci/Cd Pipelines for consistent environment provisioning
learning_path.title: Infrastructure As Code (Terraform): Provisioning Repeatable Environments

objectives: Automate configuration tasks across Linux systems using Ansible
Coordinate Ansible with Terraform-provisioned infrastructure and pipeline execution
learning_path.title: Configuration Management (Ansible): System and App Configuration at Scale

objectives: Implement least-privilege access patterns using Iam/Vault concepts
Manage secrets safely across Ci/Cd Pipelines and runtime environments
learning_path.title: Security And Secrets Management (Iam/Vault): Access and Secret Handling

objectives: Instrument and collect metrics for containerized workloads
Create dashboards and alerts to detect and respond to incidents
learning_path.title: Monitoring And Alerting (Prometheus/Grafana): Metrics and SLO-Driven Operations

objectives: Aggregate and query logs to support debugging and incident response
Establish log practices that complement monitoring and alerting
learning_path.title: Logging And Log Management (Elk/Efk): Centralized Logs and Troubleshooting

objectives: Package and deliver a JavaScript application using consistent build and deployment practices
Connect application delivery to Ci/Cd Pipelines and containerized runtime patterns
learning_path.title: JavaScript and software frameworks in a DevOps Delivery Context

objectives: Deliver a containerized application through Ci/Cd Pipelines into Kubernetes on Cloud Platforms (Aws/Azure/Gcp)
Provision infrastructure with Terraform, configure with Ansible, secure with Iam/Vault, and validate with Prometheus/Grafana and Elk/Efk
learning_path.title: End-to-End Delivery Capstone: From Git to Cloud with Observability

matched_occupation.description: Cloud DevOps engineers implement and manage continuous software delivery systems and methodologies. This includes managing and configuring code repositories, build services, automated testing, and deployment mechanisms. For cloud-based workloads, a Cloud DevOps Engineer define and deploy infrastructure as code, automating test and development environments. They can define and configure automated disaster recovery solutions that meet business objectives.
matched_occupation.label: cloud DevOps engineer
